name: codex-whatsapp
description: Use a private wake-name assistant in your WhatsApp self-chat with self-only sending by default.

interface.shortDescription: Send WhatsApp messages with your approval
interface.longDescription: Choose a bot name and polling interval, connect WhatsApp Web by QR, and run text or armed voice commands only from your own self-chat.
defaultPrompt: Set up my private WhatsApp assistant
Send a WhatsApp message for me
